misc: Originally known to many Hector players from his past appearances in Finnkampen events
biography: Jari, a familiar face to many through his appearances in Finnkampen events, brings a wealth of experience to the greens of the Hector Trophée. Representing Archipelagia Golf Club, Jari is known for his calm demeanor and strategic approach to the game.

Jari made his debut in the Hector Trophée in the past, securing a memorable victory. While the Victor trophy has eluded him thus far, Jari's focus remains steadfast on contributing to his team's success and claiming the coveted Hector Trophée once again at the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026.
